title: The Mango Orchard

description: A warm coming-of-age story set among sunlit groves and family secrets.

title: Stars Over Sundarban

description: A riverboat scientist maps the delta and discovers a hidden observatory.

title: Signals and Stories

description: Short stories about the people behind the devices we build and love.

title: The Quiet Algorithm

description: A novel about a translator who teaches machines the language of empathy.

title: Paper Boats of Dhaka

description: A poetic journey through neighborhoods, markets, and monsoon memories.

title: Pulse of the Lab

description: A beginner-friendly guide to modern experiments in materials science.

title: Threads of the Bay

description: A multigenerational saga woven around craft, trade, and resilience.

title: Designing for Tomorrow
author: Rafiq Hasan
description: A practical playbook for building human-centered digital products.

title: Delta Field Notes

description: Travel journals and scientific notes from expeditions across the delta.

title: The Library of Small Wonders

description: A mystery set inside a floating library with a hidden second deck.

title: Code Beyond Borders

description: Case studies on collaborative software teams across continents.

title: Skyline Biology

description: Explores how urban ecosystems adapt and thrive in dense cities.
